en: A: Hello, what are you looking for?
B: I want to buy a cup.
A: Hello, what do you want to buy?
A: Hello, what do you want to buy?
B: I want to buy a hat.

ab: pbazi saku’ kopu’. nyux simu mtbazi?
ch: A:我要買杯子，你們有賣嗎?
en: A: I want to buy a cup, do you sell them?
B: Yes, how many do you want to buy?
A: Do you sell betel nut?

ab: ungat ay. ini’ sami ptbazi binro.
en: B: No, we don’t sell betel nut.
A: I want to buy rice.
B: How many packs do you want to buy?
A: Give me three packs.
A: I want to buy sweet potatoes.

ab: wal suqun mtbazi kwara’ qu ngahi hiya’/hizya’ la.
en: B: All the sweet potatoes are sold out.

ab: wal naha’ bzirun kwara’ qu ngahi’ hiya’/hizya’ la.
en: B: All the sweet potatoes are bought out.
A: I want to buy two bottles of oil.

ab: qutux balay yuyut nyux msthay la.
en: B: We only have one bottle left.
A: Go buy me eggs.
B: How many pounds do you want to buy?
A: How many pounds of eggs do you want to buy?
B: I want to buy two catties.
A: I want to buy two green onions.
A: I want to buy two green onions.

ab: cyugal bhul nyux sqani, si misu’ bqan kwara’ la.
en: B: There are three left, all for you!
A: How much is this bag of rice?
B: $200 for a pack.
B: $200 for a pack.

ab: mpusal qutux pila’ kwara’. nway mpusal pila’ sbiq su’.
en: A:The total is $21, just count $20.
B: Thank you.
A: Here’s $90.

ab: twangay maku’ mbazi cikay lozi, si ta’ pthki qutux kbhul pila’.
en: B: I’ll buy some more, and make up 100 yuan.

ab: twangay maku’ mbazi cikay lawzi, si ta’ pthki qutux kbhul pila’.
en: B: I’ll buy some more, and make up 100 yuan.

ab: kwara’ lga, zmagal kbhul ru mopu pila’.
en: A:All $510.

ab: kwara’ lga, zima’ kbhul ru mawpu pila’.
en: A:All $510.
B: Count me in for $500, okay?
B: Count me in for $500, okay?

ab: lokah izyal qani hiya’ la, pkhunk cikay, ku.
ch: A+:這個太貴了，可以算便宜一點嗎?
en: A: It’s too expensive, can you make it cheaper?

ab: lawkah izyal qani hizya’ la, pkhunk cikay, ma’.
ch: A:這個太貴了，可以算便宜一點嗎?
en: A: It’s too expensive, can you make it cheaper?

ab: hmit izyal qani hizya’ la, pkhunk cikay, ma’.
ch: A:這個太貴了，可以算便宜一點嗎?
en: A: It’s too expensive, can you make it cheaper?

ab: izyat wah! mhnuk linpgan maku’ l’ay.
ch: B:不行，我算得很便宜了喔。
en: B: No, I counted very cheaply.

ab: bziraw ta’ qutux sinbwan pyah qani.
en: A: I want this packet of cookies.

ab: bziraw ta’ qutux sinbwan kahat qani.
en: A: I want this packet of cookies.

ab: pyah qani ga, mtzyul pila’. kya na’ bzirun su’?
ch: B:這餅乾30元，還需要別的東西嗎?
en: B: $30 for the cookies, anything else you need?

ab: kahat qani ga, mtzyul pila’. kya na’ bzirun su’?
ch: B:這餅乾30元，還需要別的東西嗎?
en: B: $30 for the cookies, anything else you need?
